headline: Strategic angle — Issue ₹500 Cr green bond leveraging new ESG rating to access lower-cost capital
what_matters: Adani Power closes the ESG score gap with peers like JSW Energy, improving its standing for index inclusion and reducing risk of exclusion from ESG funds.
Improved ESG rating enhances employer brand and trust, aiding talent acquisition and retention, as supported by Edelman Trust Barometer correlations.
Triggers BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, and ESRS frameworks; aligns with SEBI and EU CSRD disclosure requirements, reducing penalty risk and regulatory scrutiny.
action: Strategic opportunity: Issue ₹500 Cr green bond leveraging new ESG rating to access lower-cost capital
Competitive position: Adani Power gains ground on JSW Energy, potentially surpassing peers in ESG fund eligibility
